content.en:
"I haven't mentioned the talent of immortality to anyone, how does he know?"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord was shocked.

Soon, he guessed a reason, that is, Ye Tian could see through his talent.

The strong can see through the talent of the weak, he knows it.

But Ye Tian was obviously not as strong as him, and it was impossible to see through his talent at a glance.

Then there is only one reason, that is, Ye Tian has special means, he can see his talent, or he can also have a special perfect treasure.

Immortal resurrection and infinite resurrection, if the two are connected, and then deduced, it may be possible to identify that there is a problem with the secret art of infinite resurrection.

What he was worried about now was not that Ye Tian knew his talent, he couldn't fool Ye Tian, he was worried that Ye Tian would poke this matter out.

In that case, the geniuses he controlled would be exposed, and all the efforts he had made before would be in vain.

Then.

Ye Tian said again: "Stone Dragon Demon Lord, although I don't know how many geniuses you have controlled, you don't want this matter to be exposed. "

"What do you want to do?"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said coldly.

"Good!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Even you, who are qualified to threaten me?" the Stone Dragon Demon Lord was furious.

A mere half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, even if his talent is demonic, what qualifications does he have to threaten a super perfect controller like him?

And.

He himself is an immortal existence, with infinite resurrection, he is almost difficult to kill, will he be afraid of Ye Tian?

What's more, even if the matter was exposed, it would be very difficult to find a genius who had cultivated infinite resurrection, and if he didn't have the talent of immortal resurrection, he wouldn't be able to find anyone who had cultivated the secret technique of infinite resurrection.

Of course, if that Extreme Realm Perfect Controller investigates one by one and explores time and space, he may find it, but the impact is too great, and those forces may not necessarily do it.

Therefore, he was not afraid of Ye Tian's threat.

"Do you think that the geniuses you control, no one will find out?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Yes, so what?"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said.

"But you dare to control their genius, which angers the top powers. In the past, although you had conflicts with the major forces, the most you offended were those who were in control of the super-perfect perfection. But this time, who knows if the descendants of those who are perfect controllers of the Three Realms have been controlled by you. So, they're going to want to kill you. Of course, you think that you can't die with infinite resurrection, but I know very well that there are limits to your infinite resurrection. If you are killed, if you are killed again in 10,000 eternal years, you will never be resurrected. I don't think if the Extreme Perfect Controller really wants to kill you, you won't necessarily be able to hide. For example, if you have cultivated the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller of the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect and cultivated the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect to an extremely high level, with the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect, do you think you can lock your true body?"

Ye Tian threatened.

"Cause and Effect Extreme!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord's face changed.

Although he transcended the ordinary path, the path of cause and effect was of no use to him, but the path of cause and effect could lock the position of the enemy through the path of cause.

A perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, if he cultivates the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect to an extremely high realm, it is really simple to lock his position.

The point is that his secret was actually known by Ye Tian.

"You even know the secret that I couldn't be resurrected after being killed for 10,000 eternity, it seems that your means can see through the detailed abilities of your talent!"

He thought about it carefully, if the secret of his control over the geniuses of the major forces was completely revealed, it would really anger an Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, and the other party would invite an Extreme Realm Perfect Controller who was good at the Extreme Path of Cause and Effect, and he would really be able to kill him.

Unless, he kills Ye Tian now.

However, Ye Tian's true body must be in the Wudao Tower, and he can't kill Ye Tian.

Of course, it is also possible that even if the secret is exposed, the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm will not care about him, so it is safe.

But he didn't dare to bet!

"Infinite Master, you didn't immediately expose me, what do you want, tell me your conditions!

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord asked.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, and then said: "I don't need to create extreme substances, I'm curious, why is your immortal resurrection a mutated perfection-level ancestral endowment, is there any way to make a perfect-level ancestral endowment mutate?"

Ye Tian knew that his talent was a mutation talent, and the Stone Dragon Demon Lord was not surprised, after all, if Ye Tian could spy on the details of the immortal resurrection, he would naturally know that this was a mutated perfection-level ancestral endowment.

But this involves a chance for him, and he doesn't want to say it casually.

However, if he didn't say it, Ye Tian was afraid that he wouldn't keep it a secret.

"Tell me, that place is very dangerous, and if the Infinite Masters dare to enter it, they will definitely die. As long as he is allowed to make an extreme vow not to say it, he alone knows that he can't do anything. "

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said secretly.

So, he revealed: "The reason why my immortal resurrection talent mutated is because I found a treasure in one place that can mutate the talent, of course, the mutation may make the perfect-level ancestor weaker, I am lucky, so that the perfect-level ancestor can become stronger!"

"Where's that place?"

Ye Tian was curious.

After all, treasures that can affect the Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment are too rare, since there are treasures that affect the Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment, will there be a treasure that can transform the replication talent?

If there is, then he can upgrade the copying talent to a level comparable to the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, and he can also copy the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu of the Void Dark Sparrow.

"I can tell you, but you must make an extreme oath that you are not allowed to tell anyone, and you are not allowed to bring anyone else over!" the Stone Dragon Demon Lord demanded.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, he made an oath with the Extreme Dao of the Sword, which made the Stone Dragon Demon Lord nod with satisfaction.

"I'll take you to that place, or you won't find it even if you do. Okay, after I take you, there will be no relationship between us, and you don't come to me, and I won't bother you. Of course, you can't reveal my business. "The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian nodded in agreement.

Immediately.

Ye Tian's copy body followed the Stone Dragon Demon Lord out of the Eternal Ruins, constantly shuttling through the end of the realm.

Even though the speed of the two of them was fast, that place was far, far away from here.

The two traveled for a long time before arriving at their destination.
